conflictDescription: Board member of Kenya Commercial Bank (KCB), which holds government securities managed by the National Treasury. Potential conflict in decisions relating to government bond issuance and primary dealer arrangements.
mitigationActions: Recuses from all deliberations and decisions relating to KCB's primary dealer status and government securities allocations. Conflict disclosed to full committee and noted in minutes.
reviewComments: Conflict noted and managed through recusal protocol. Committee satisfied with mitigation measures.

conflictDescription: Former Principal Secretary at the Ministry of Transport. Kenya Railways Corporation and Kenya Ports Authority, both SOEs under National Treasury oversight, have ongoing infrastructure projects with the Ministry of Transport. Potential perception of conflict in SOE performance reviews.
mitigationActions: Discloses prior role at each meeting where KRC and KPA matters are discussed. Does not participate in votes on capital allocation or executive appointments for these entities.
reviewComments: Prior employment relationship noted. Committee satisfied that sufficient time has elapsed and mitigation measures are adequate.

conflictDescription: KCB Group has submitted a bid to acquire a 40% stake in Kenya Development Corporation (KDC), an SOE under National Treasury oversight. The acquisition requires National Treasury approval.
mitigationActions: Recused from all deliberations relating to the KDC stake acquisition by KCB Group.
reviewComments: Under review — Ethics Committee to determine whether recusal is sufficient or whether board member should step aside for the duration of the KDC transaction.
